name: Sandy's Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped (or canned tomatoes, drained)
recipeInstructions:
Cook lasagna noodles in boiling, salted water until "al dente" (firm to the bite). Drain and keep in cold water until ready to use.
Saute ground beef, onion, and garlic in olive oil until meat is no longer pink. Remove excess fat. Add remaining ingredients up to Bechamel and cook at a fast simmer until sauce is quite thick (about 30 to 40 minutes).
Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
Prepare the Bechamel: Melt butter, add flour and cook, stirring with a whisk for one minute. Slowly add milk and chicken broth and bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Add salt and chicken bouillon cube if needed. Continue cooking until thickened.
Prepare the Ricotta Filling: Beat egg in a bowl. Add remaining filling ingredients and stir well with a fork.
Assemble lasagne in a lightly greased 13-by-9-inch baking dish as follows: Layer 1/3 of the meat sauce, then half of the noodles, then half of the remaining meat sauce, 1/2 cup Bechamel, 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, half of the mozzarella, half of Tielme (or mozzarella), and half of the ricotta filling. Repeat once. Dot with butter.
If desired, cover lasagne and refrigerate.
Bake from room temperature until bubbly, about 30 minutes.
